title: Villages Plus
description: This mod adds a villager economy with a custom block and villager wars with also a custom block to start them, you can hire villagers, and also work for villagers, and they will pay you each minecraft day, theres also bounties too!
body:
**--Villages Plus Features--**

- Makes villagers actually do their jobs! 13 unique profession-specific AI tasks including farming, fishing, mining, healing, and more
- Villagers need Emeralds to work, 1 Emerald per day. Give them a Block of Emerald to clear their inventory
- Hire villagers for 32 Diamonds, they sell their items for free with infinite stock
- Work FOR villagers and earn daily rewards: Iron, Gold, Emeralds, or Diamonds
- Mayor's Trading Square, buy every item in the game and enchant your gear for Emeralds
- Village Wars, villages fight each other! Villagers arm up with iron gear and battle
- Villager Militia, armed villagers defend against hostile mobs during raids
- Bounty Board, accept quests to kill mobs or gather items for Emerald rewards
- Festival Events, random celebrations with 50% off Mayor Shop prices
- Build a Mayor Hall or Villager Outpost with /villagerjobs build
- Custom config menu (C key) to toggle professions, adjust rewards, and customize everything
- Outpost block to start wars, Mayor's Desk block to open the trading square
- Commands: /villagerjobs help for all available commands
- Check changelog for new updates

This mod supports 1.21.10 and more soon.

**Made by MaceMeta**
